title: Sour Flaky Spanish Cherry Tart
description: A bright, tart cherry tart with a crisp, buttery crust and a citrusy, slightly sour filling, perfect for a light dessert or afternoon snack.

ingredients.name: Unsalted butter, cut into small cubes
Low-sodium salt
ingredients.notes: optional, use if needed for flavor

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly grease a 9-inch tart pan.
Roll out pastry and line the pan, pressing into corners. Prick the bottom with a fork and chill for 15 minutes.
In a bowl, combine cherries, sugar, cornstarch, lemon zest, lemon juice, vanilla, and oregano; mix gently to coat cherries.
Spread the cherry mixture evenly over the pastry base.
Dot the filling with butter cubes, ensuring they melt into the cherries as baked.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and cherries are bubbling.
Remove from oven and let the tart cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Slice and serve warm or at room temperature.
